title: Create a student account and land on the student dashboard
description: Verifies a new student can register successfully and is automatically signed in and redirected to the student dashboard.

steps.description: Fill New Student into the name field
Fill student+new@example.com into the email field
Fill ValidPass123! into the password field
Verify the user lands on the student dashboard

title: Admin can log in and reach the admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can log in and is redirected to the admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Student can log in and reach the student dashboard
description: Verifies an existing student can log in and is redirected to the student dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the student dashboard

title: Admin can log in and land on the admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can log in and is redirected to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Browse public catalog and open a course detail
description: Verifies a public visitor can browse the course catalog and open a course detail page that displays sections, an embedded lesson video, resources, and comments.

steps.description: Verify the course detail page displays a list of sections
Verify an embedded lesson video is displayed along with resources and comments

title: Student can log out and return to public views
description: Verifies a signed-in user can log out and the app shows non-authenticated public views afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the site shows non-authenticated public views

title: Create a new course with a valid YouTube section and resource
description: Verifies an admin can create a course with at least one section using a valid YouTube URL and at least one resource, and the new course appears in the admin list.

steps.description: Click the link to manage courses
Click the action to create a new course
Fill "Automation Course A" into the course title field
Fill "Intro" into the section title field
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the section video URL field
Fill "Resource 1" into the resource title field
Fill "https://example.com/resource-1" into the resource URL field
Verify the new course appears in the admin course list

title: Post a comment as a logged-in student
description: Verifies a student can log in, open a course, submit a comment, and see it appear in the discussion thread.

steps.description: Click the link to view the course catalog
Fill "This is a test comment" into the comment field
Verify the new comment appears in the discussion thread

title: Signed-in student sees course list and comment count on dashboard
description: Verifies the student dashboard displays available courses and the student's comment count.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the student's comment count is displayed

title: Admin can reply to a student comment from the moderation list
description: Verifies an admin can enter a reply for a comment and the reply is shown as associated with that comment in the moderation view.

steps.description: Type a reply into the reply input for a comment
Verify the admin reply is displayed as associated with that comment

title: Switch sections updates the embedded lesson content
description: Verifies a public visitor can switch between course sections and the embedded lesson video/content updates to match the selected section.

steps.description: Click a different section in the section list
Verify the selected section's embedded lesson video is displayed
Verify the selected section's content is displayed

title: Student can open a course detail view from the dashboard
description: Verifies a student can open a course from the dashboard and reach its course detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a course from the dashboard course list
Verify the course detail view is displayed

title: Edit an existing course and section with a valid YouTube URL
description: Verifies an admin can create a course, edit its details and section video URL, save changes, and see the updated course reflected in the admin list.

steps.description: Click the link to manage courses
Click the action to create a new course
Fill "Automation Course B" into the course title field
Fill "Section 1" into the section title field
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the section video URL field
Select the newly created course from the list
Fill "Automation Course B Updated" into the course title field
Fill a different valid YouTube URL into the section video URL field
Verify the updated course is shown in the admin course list

title: Admin can delete a comment from the moderation list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a comment and it is removed from the moderation list.

steps.description: Delete a comment from the moderation list
Verify the deleted comment is no longer displayed in the moderation list

title: Delete a course removes it from the admin list
description: Verifies an admin can create a course and then delete it, and the course no longer appears in the admin course list.

steps.description: Click the link to manage courses
Click the action to create a new course
Fill "Automation Course C" into the course title field
Fill "Section 1" into the section title field
Fill a valid YouTube URL into the section video URL field
Select the newly created course from the list
Verify the course is removed from the admin course list

title: Block registration when required fields are missing or invalid
description: Verifies a student cannot register with missing or invalid required inputs and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill Invalid User into the name field
Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill short into the password field
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Empty comment is blocked with validation
description: Verifies a student cannot submit an empty comment and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Click the link to view the course catalog
Verify a comment validation error is visible
Verify no new comment is added to the discussion thread

title: Admin reply form blocks saving an empty reply
description: Verifies the moderation UI prevents submitting an empty admin reply and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Clear the reply input for a comment so it is empty
Verify a reply validation error is visible

title: Course creation blocks missing title or invalid YouTube URL
description: Verifies the admin course form enforces validation by preventing submission when the title is missing or a section has an invalid YouTube URL.

steps.description: Click the link to manage courses
Click the action to create a new course
Fill "Section Invalid" into the section title field
Fill "not-a-youtube-url" into the section video URL field
Verify a validation error is visible for missing required fields or invalid YouTube URL
Verify the course is not created and does not appear in the admin course list

title: Show validation when logging in without required fields
description: Verifies login cannot be submitted with missing required inputs and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Public course detail renders safely when optional content is missing
description: Verifies a public visitor can open a course detail page and the UI renders an appropriate empty state when sections, resources, or comments are absent.

steps.description: Verify the course detail page renders without broken UI and shows empty-state messaging where content is missing
Verify the comments area is visible and usable for viewing even when there are no comments

title: Admin comments page renders an empty state when there are no comments
description: Verifies the admin comments moderation page shows an empty state when there are no student comments to moderate.

steps.description: Verify an empty state is displayed for no comments
